svg.title: ADAS Simulator — 4-week detailed build plan
svg.desc: A week-by-week plan across 4 weeks, each week covering specific milestones, daily tasks, stack, and a deliverable to demo at the end of the week.
svg.text: Jun 23 → Jul 20, 2026 · Each week ends with a working demo

g.text: ✓ Demo: tracked vehicles with persistent IDs, motion trails, FPS counter on dashcam footage

svg.text: Stack: YOLOv11n · ByteTrack · OpenCV · PyTorch CUDA (GTX 4050)

g.text: ✓ Demo: lane lines + sign labels + per-object distance — all running simultaneously

svg.text: Stack: CLRNet / Hough · GTSRB classifier · Depth Anything V2 · ONNX Runtime

g.text: ✓ Demo: FCW alert fires in video + FastAPI returns trip analytics via REST

svg.text: Stack: FastAPI · PostgreSQL · WebSocket · scipy (TTC) · NumPy

g.text: ✓ Demo: live React dashboard showing real-time ADAS telemetry, deployed on Azure

svg.text: Stack: React · Vite · Tailwind · Chart.js · Docker · Azure Container Apps · GitHub Actions

g.text: GitHub repo · production folder structure · 7 modules · Docker image · Azure URL
Demo video · README with architecture diagram · unit tests
Tech on resume: YOLOv11 · ByteTrack · Depth Anything V2 · FastAPI · React · PostgreSQL · Docker · Azure
Rule: every Friday = working demo + git push. Never end a week mid-feature.
